tasks.dev:open: sh -c "PORT=3000 deno run --unstable-kv --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env examples/sync/server.ts & sleep 0.5; (xdg-open http://localhost:3000/examples/ || open http://localhost:3000/examples/)"
tasks.examples:open: sh -c "PORT=3000 deno run --unstable-kv --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env examples/sync/server.ts & sleep 0.5; (xdg-open http://localhost:3000/examples/ || open http://localhost:3000/examples/)"
